outcome.transcript:
[   1.0s] Customer: Hello?
[   2.0s] Kate: Hello! This is Kate calling about your 2025 Jeep Grand Cherokee. Our system has detected that it needs service for maintenance. I'd love to help you get that scheduled at Village Jeep — does that work for you?
[  14.0s] Customer: Sure.
[  16.0s] Kate: Great! Here are the available appointment times: Tuesday, May 12th at 8:30 in the morning, Tuesday, May 12th at 1:30 in...
